steps.title: Spot the term needing definition
steps.content: The previous sentence introduces “annular” but doesn't explain what it means; the blank sentence provides that definition.

steps.title: Select the clarification transition
steps.content:
“That is,” introduces a definition of a term just introduced, clarifying what “annular” means: the Moon didn't cover the Sun completely.

The other choices mark contrast, simultaneity, or specific instances—none of which define “annular.” That matches choice A — A is correct.
